examples: The Met, for its part, is undergoing as much upheaval as News International, which owned the now-defunct newspaper.

One of Libya’s two mobile-phone networks is defunct and the other works only patchily.
Al-Hadi was "clearly in the senior ranks, " a member of a now-defunct 10-person governing council.
Here are seven companies (the last defunct) and partial descriptions of their product lines.
